description_long: This house features a modern architectural design with clean lines, flat roofs, and a mix of white and dark gray exterior walls. The property is surrounded by a low perimeter wall and includes a driveway leading to a garage. The landscaping incorporates green rooftop terraces, manicured lawns, and several trees along the side and rear of the property. A swimming pool is situated in the backyard, adjacent to a sculptural element and a privacy wall. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and visual connection between indoor and outdoor spaces. The overall layout is open and geometric, emphasizing outdoor living and contemporary aesthetics.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with white and dark gray walls, rooftop terraces, a pool, and landscaped grounds.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, garage, and layered green terraces.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated layout, rooftop greenery, and backyard pool with trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall, private garden, and minimal window openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view revealing the pool, sculptural feature, and additional green spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, minimal steps, and a wide modern door integrated into the facade
